MEASURED-KEY provenance encoding — pins the format detail under DECISIONS_LOCKED "Measured-KEY authority = MIK, in Camelot" (line 45). MIK writes Camelot UNPADDED (1A, 4B — never 01A/04B); the missing zero-pad is the deliberate provenance marker that makes a value recognizable as MIK-emitted at a glance, the formatting-level expression of the already-locked principle that Camelot notation is self-identifying as MIK-sourced. A resolver collapses key values from ANY source (Rekordbox untrusted ~40% stale, Apple MU apple_key corroborator-only ~78%) to the MIK source-of-truth (Collection11.mikdb ZSONG.ZKEY, path-joined to audio_file), realized as dj_tag.key_camelot. Storage is Camelot-PRIMARY (the authority); classical notation (F# min) is a convertible VIEW, never the stored authority — same measured-vs-provider split as BPM, never overwrites slut canonical_key. DRIFT CAUGHT: a schema comment (musical_key TEXT -- e.g. F# min / camelot resolved at render) had the polarity inverted (classical-primary, render-time Camelot) — corrected to Camelot-primary so the provenance marker actually gets written and the resolver has something to key on. This promotes a transcript-only agreement into the record; the padding rule was decided but never written in DECISIONS_LOCKED.

Phase 3 (ts-stage --v4-intake) design fact-check — TWO forced deviations from prompt 2-intake-off-v3.md, both with code receipts. (1) POSITION: reconcile step MUST run AFTER 'art + promote', NOT next to register/v3-scan as the prompt's literal text says. A normal ts-stage 'register' writes the v3 files row at the STAGING path; promote's db_update_path rewrites files.path -> ML destination (tools/review/promote_replace_merge.py:421-431). The bridge seeds 'FROM files WHERE path LIKE MASTER_LIBRARY%' (migrate_v3_to_v4.py:174, header line 5), so pre-promote placement = files.path still staging = ML filter excludes them = SILENT ZERO-RECONCILE (no crash). Post-promote is the only position that writes FINAL ML-relative paths (the prompt's own non-negotiable). (2) SCOPE KEY: post-promote the files are under ML, NOT under staging root_path, so scoping by current path finds nothing. Correct key = files.original_path, preserved by promote as COALESCE(original_path,path)=staging origin (same lines). Verified: files.original_path col 67 populated 29,511/31,657 ML rows. Scoped seed = 'path LIKE ML% AND (original_path LIKE root% OR path LIKE root%)' (2nd disjunct = in-place case, e.g. gu_nubreed8 already at ML). --library-root stays MASTER_LIBRARY for relativization. Neither is a silent pick: both dictated by the prompt's binding constraints (final ML paths, scoped-to-this-run, idempotent); only the prompt's incidental placement hint was under-informed re the files.path lifecycle. Analogous to Phase 0's flagged sha-OR-path deviation. Building on this design now; verify on a v4 COPY, gu_nubreed8 6-create fixture, live md5 unchanged until gated --apply.
